title: A Resolution Respectfully Endorsing to the Hon. Wendel E. Avisado, Secretary, Department of Budget and Management the Covid-19-related Programs, Projects and Activities (ppas) and Expenses of the Municipality of Los Baños Amounting to Thirty-seven Million for Funding Under the Local Government Support Fund-covid-19 Financial Assistance to Lgus Under the Bayanihan to Recover As One Act. ( AUTHOR : HON. GERONIMO A. CICERON, 09/28/2020)
